docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN WEBB IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED DEC-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $584.63 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $9,453.14 LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPT. RETAINS POSSESSION OF THE ORIGINAL WRIT PER CCP 263.7. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,124.05 FILED BY WEBB, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRATLI, TUGRUL $8,124.05 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,239.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.
